八闽通志

Explore the comprehensive digital reconstruction of Fujian's history. Merging traditional scholarship with modern data science to unveil 43 volumes of cultural heritage.

Vol. 1 bookmark

八闽通志

本卷为《八闽志》记载涉及8个府级行政区划，描述山川地理。涉及天文分野。...

Navigate the archive through curated thematic lenses. From maritime trade routes to agricultural developments, explore the threads that weave the history of Ba Min together.
